out_of_scope_note: Applied behavioral psychology / music-therapy study on how sound environments (MusiCure vs noise vs silence) and individual trait anxiety modulate implicit emotion processing in a gender-discrimination task. Pure behavioral RT measurements with self-report mood questionnaires; no neural recording, no encoding model, no computational/theoretical framework of brain function. Falls under 'social science / behavioral psychology without neural recording or computational model of the brain' OOS category.
